sentences.arabic: تُعَدُّ الْأَسْوَاقُ الْقَدِيمَةُ مَرْكَزًا لِلْحَيَاةِ الِاجْتِمَاعِيَّةِ فِي الْمُدُنِ الْعَرَبِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Stare pijace su centar društvenog života u arapskim gradovima.
sentences.translationEn: Old markets are a center for social life in Arab cities.

sentences.arabic: يَمْشِي الزُّوَّارُ فِي مَمَرَّاتٍ ضَيِّقَةٍ بَيْنَ مَحَلَّاتِ التَّوَابِلِ وَالْعُطُورِ.
sentences.translation: Posjetioci šetaju uskim prolazima između prodavnica začina i parfema.
sentences.translationEn: Visitors walk in narrow alleys between spice and perfume shops.

sentences.arabic: يُمْكِنُكَ رُؤْيَةُ الصِّنَاعَاتِ الْيَدَوِيَّةِ مِثْلَ السَّجَّادِ وَالنُّحَاسِ.
sentences.translation: Možete vidjeti ručne radove poput tepiha i bakra.
sentences.translationEn: You can see handicrafts such as carpets and copper.

sentences.arabic: يَتَفَاوَضُ الْبَائِعُ وَالْمُشْتَرِي عَلَى الْأَسْعَارِ بِطَرِيقَةٍ مُمْتِعَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Prodavac i kupac se na zabavan način cjenkaju oko cijena.
sentences.translationEn: The seller and the buyer negotiate prices in a fun way.

sentences.arabic: تَفُوحُ فِي الْمَكَانِ رَائِحَةُ الْبَخُورِ وَالتَّارِيخِ الْعَرِيقِ.
sentences.translation: Mjestom se širi miris tamjana i drevne historije.
sentences.translationEn: The smell of incense and ancient history wafts through the place.
